summary: This mobile page is a very minimal password gate rather than a full booking flow. The screen is mostly white space, with a centered guest access prompt, a single password field, and a prominent red submit button; a small close X sits near the top right.

layout.summary: This mobile page is a very minimal password gate rather than a full booking flow. The screen is mostly white space, with a centered guest access prompt, a single password field, and a prominent red submit button; a small close X sits near the top right.

sections.name: Modal/guest access gate
sections.description: The entire viewport functions like a guest-only password entry screen. There is no visible site navigation or page content behind it, just a simple centered form on a white background.
components: close icon (X) in the upper-right area
sections.copy_gist: Guest Area; Please enter the password below.; Password; Go

header.nav_style: No normal site header/navigation is visible. Instead, there is a small close X icon near the top-right corner that likely dismisses the gate.
header.sticky: Not applicable; no sticky header is shown.

hero.imagery: No imagery, icons, or illustrations besides the close X. The layout is purely typographic and form-based.

color_impressions.overall_palette_feel: Extremely minimal, high-contrast, and utilitarian. The red accent strongly emphasizes the form action against a clean white canvas.

typography_impressions.heading_body_feel: Large thin sans-serif headline with a modern, airy feel; smaller regular-weight supporting text.
typography_impressions.scale: The title is oversized relative to the rest of the page, while the instruction and input label are modest in size.
typography_impressions.weight: Light/regular overall, with the button text set in a clear medium weight.

layout.corner_style: Mostly sharp edges; the button and input appear rectangular with minimal rounding, if any.
layout.imagery_style: No photographic or decorative imagery. The only visual mark is a thin-line close icon.
layout.responsive_notes: On mobile, the form is centered with generous whitespace and a single-column layout. The password field and button span a moderate width, making the gate easy to use with one hand; no secondary content needs to reflow.
